title: Every Day Is a New Day

text_block_list.name: Television
text_block_list.text:
Also seen at the Embassy of Ireland's gala yesterday was a
distinguished young guest currently studying abroad at the Japan
Umamusume Training Center Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That was the first time I heard of her—a news snippet blaring from a
TV in an electronics store window.

Hmm... What should I do? ...Oh! Pardon, may I have a moment of your
time?

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Indeed I do. Hehe, I'm terribly sorry to have startled you. I was
hoping to consult a local about something.

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You see, I heard that this convenience shop had a dining counter. I
purchased a cup of ramen and took it to a seat, but...

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid the server never came to prepare the noodles. Would you
happen to know if the dining service is closed today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about as perplexed as she is, but I explain that convenience stores
have hot-water dispensers for customers to make the ramen
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Eh? I get to make it myself?! Me, making ramen?! Why, that... that...

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds wonderful! If I may ask, where might I find this
hot-water dispenser?

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sigh. That was such a lovely experience! To have shopping, cooking, and dining services all in one shop—it really is convenient!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I cannot thank you enough for your kind guidance. ♪ Now, if I may
ask...

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Could I trouble you to escort me to Ramen Rampage?

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, no, I'm sorry! Ehehe, it seems I got ahead of myself. A local
student would look the route up online, wouldn't they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mean... yeah, probably. But her way of saying it leaves me slightly
concerned—it's like she's never stepped out into the real world
before.
choice_data_list: I can show you the way.

text_block_list.name: Owner of Ramen Joint
text_block_list.text: ...Seiyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Did he... He did! He just did the Rampage Colander Cross! I
can't believe I'm seeing it live!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's the technique he uses to drain the starchy water he boiled
the ramen in. It preserves the integrity of the noodles' texture and the
flavor of the rich chicken stock!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
When I read about it online, I just knew I had to see it for myself!
Ahhh... It was worth the forty-three-day wait!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The glistening beads of water, cast vigorously into flight but inches
from my eyes... The chef's passion stokes the appetite more than I
ever could have imagined!

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I truly cannot thank you enough for escorting me. You have my
deepest gratitude!
choice_data_list:
I'm glad to hear it, but I really didn't do
anything special...

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but you did. I have no doubt I'll be cherishing this experience for
the rest of my life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the pure excitement in her eyes... For some reason, I feel like
the moment will linger in my memory too.

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's almost sundown! That's a shame. I was thinking to squeeze in
one more stop.
choice_data_list:
There's still plenty of time before the dorm's
curfew.

There's still plenty of time before the dorm's
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Regal Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I know, but it's not the dormitory's curfew I'm—Oh.

...Your Highness, please pardon the intrusion, but your excursion was
only permitted on the grounds that you would return by sunset. Please
make your way to the dormitory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next thing I know, we're surrounded by impending figures in suits.
Where did they all come from?!

text_block_list.name: Suit-clad Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And you—it was not our intent to disturb your conversation.
However...

text_block_list.name: Suit-clad Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Our charge, Fine Motion, descends from a royal bloodline. Though
her noble house has since come to reside in Ireland...
choice_data_list: W-wait, back up. She's a descendant of royalty?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for your concern, Captain. I'll return to the dormitory as
soon I finish thanking my gracious host.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hope my security didn't scare you. Thank you again for
everything. I made some truly wonderful memories today!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Please take this as a token of my appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She places something in my palm with a firm handshake and then
turns to leave, allowing the security guards to lead her away to the
station.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frozen from shock, it's not until they leave that I'm able to look at
what she gave me. It's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A Ramen Rampage coupon.
